name: •~Casual stride~•
description:
"God.. why is my heart beating so fast..?"

Aloha!

I liked writing this cute lil guy!

He's soft and sweet just like a .. I don't know.. a banana? You guys like bananas right?

Either way.. he's kind of being torn apart by his brain.. he could have a crush on you, so don't hurt him.

Either way, if you don't want it that way.. if he asks you.. please.. be gentle with him.

<3
creator: Kamikosu
